titleStmt.title: SII 17.93: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 93. (A.R. No. 82-B of 1904). BĀGAḶI, HARPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: On pillar in the maṇḍapa in front of the Narasimhasvāmin shrine in the Kallēśvara temple.

This is dated in the cyclic year Plava, Vaiśākha, ba. 30, Monday. Palaeographically the record may be assigned to about the 11th century. The details correspond to 1031 A.D., May 21, the month being Nija Vaiśākha.
It registers a gift of land for offerings to god Narasiṁhadēva, in the temple, of Kalidēva, by the fifty mahājanas of agrahāra Bāguḷi called by the appellation Hariśchandradatti.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta praśastisahitaṁ śrīmatu haraścaṁ
dra dattiya piriyagrahāraṁ bāgu
ḷiya Aivadiṁbaru plava saṁvatsarada
vayiśākha bahuḷa 30 sōmavā
radaṁdu kalidēvaroḷagaṇa narasiṁ
hvadēvara yamritapaḍige kaṭṭaḷe ke
ṟeyakeḷage koṭa kaṁba 10 [�]
ppaya dēvarali tōṭa kaṁba yi
ṣṭa� śrī mānyavāgi salisu
varu . Ī dha¨rmmava māḍidāta
yaṁmma nāgaṁṇa śrī kali
nātha 10
Digital edition of SII 17.93 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
